channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tip of part of double bed, 5th April
item.description:
There is part of a dumped double bed base in park just off betts way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Betts Way, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black container bins not emptied, 5th April
item.description:
Black communal container bins not emptied when due to be.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vousden Grove, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car parts, 5th April
item.description:
Outside 62 samos road down by the garden fence there is a number of car brake parts left there is calipers and caliper mounting as well as brake pads.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on street, 5th April
item.description:
Opposite 39 Tudor Road outside the flats. There's lots of rubbish going onto the pavement blocking it and being spread across the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tudor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 5th April
item.description:
Matteres and general waste dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockley Way, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large container full of oil, 5th April
item.description:
Oil dumped on Kingswood Drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Drive, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 5th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverdale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Building waste dumped, 5th April
item.description:
Building waste dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Displaced board hanging over pavement., 5th April
item.description:
Displaced wooden board hanging at head height over pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dutton Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped chairs and hanger, 5th April
item.description:
Someone has flytipped garden chairs and a hanger. Please remove these.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed recycling pickup, 5th April
item.description:
The recycling was not collected over the Easter break. Please collect it asap, as residents aren’t able to Recycle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It has been left there for 2 months not being moved and is causing difficulties for people living there, 5th April
item.description:
The car has been parked in this spot for 2 months not moved and causing difficulties for people wanting to leave their parking space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cross Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins in blocks not emptied, 5th April
item.description:
Black communal bins in blocks not emptied last week. Overflowing.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vousden Grove, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible abandoned van, 5th April
item.description:
Van has been left here for weeks with no one checking or moving it. It has a huge scrape on the left side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balmoral Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Relocate food waste bin, 5th April
item.description:
The food waste bin is too close to the bike sheds so school kids use it to climb onto the roof and make a lot of noise and run about. They all show off climbing up and down repeatedly. Someone could break a leg up there. Please can either the bin be relocated or the roof of the sheds be made inaccessible or both

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lytham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins overflowing, 5th April
item.description:
Please empty both overflowing bins outside one stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Walk, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing huge bin kept on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
This bin is left here permanently, and is always absolutely disgustingly overflowing. The amount of wildlife it attracts results in is not ok, a whole gang of foxes every night and there is now food all over the pavement/road, it’s a disgusting nuisance and terrible for dog owners as there is now random food everywhere.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus lanes illuminated sign, 5th April
item.description:
Bulb blown, needs renewing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Place, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car left for more then 12 months. Vehicle is SORN and left in public parking which is illegal. Has no MOT and probably not insured.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 5th April
item.description:
Abandoned car is left for more then 6 months. Has no MOT and probably not insured

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alsike Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
